zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Toothill於1338年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親William Toothill53歲，母親Sybil Fixby54歲。她於1377年與William de Riley結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1410年在英國越可爾拉斯特利可享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Toothill于1338年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲William Toothill53岁，母亲Sybil Fixby54岁。她于1377年与William de Riley结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1410年在英国越可爾拉斯特利可享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Toothill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) locative name from various places named with Old English * tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (WR Yorks) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancs), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwicks), and Tothill (Lincs). There are several further minor place-names of this type that may have contributed to the surname. (ii) locative name, occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), recorded as Totehill in 1251.

variants.name: Tuthill
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of Toothill, primarily a Yorkshire habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (Yorkshire) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancashire), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwickshire), and Tothill (Lincolnshire). There are several further minor placenames of this type that may have contributed to the surname. Also occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), which derives from the Old English personal name Totta (genitive Tottan) + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Tuttle
meanings: possibly a variant of Thirkell, from the Middle English personal name T(h)irkill, T(h)urkill (Old Norse Thorkell, Thorkil, Thurkil, a shortened form of Thorketill from the god's name Thórr ‘Thor’ + ketill ‘kettle, cauldron’).

variants.name: Tott
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Tot(te) (Old English Totta, Tota). See also Totty , Tutt , and compare Sabyna Tottedoghter’, 1379 in Poll Tax (Kirkby Malham, WR Yorks); Radulphus Totusone, 1377 in Poll Tax (Frisby on the Wreak, Leics). Some early bearers may belong with (2) or (3).
2 English: nickname from Middle English tot(te) ‘simpleton, fool’.

3 English: locative name from Middle English tot(e) ‘lookout hill’ (Old English tōt(e)). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on or by a lookout hill, or toponymic, for someone from a place so named, such as Toat Farm in Pulborough (Sussex) and Toat Hill in Slinfold (Sussex). Compare Toothill .

variants.name: Tottle
meanings: 2 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name * Totel (Old English Tottel).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Toothill was born in 1338, in Yorkshire, England, her father, William Toothill, was 53 and her mother, Sybil Fixby, was 54. She married William de Riley in 1377. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1410, in Rastrick, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Toothill est née en 1338, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Toothill, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Sybil Fixby, avait 54 ans. Elle a épousé William de Riley en 1377. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1410, à Rastrick, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Toothill 1338 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Toothill 53 und ihre Mutter Sybil Fixby 54. Sie hat 1377 William de Riley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1410 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Rastrick, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Toothill è nata il nel 1338 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William Toothill, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Sybil Fixby, aveva 54 anni. Lei sposato William de Riley nel 1377. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1410, nel Rastrick, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Toothillが1338年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Toothillは53歳，母Sybil Fixbyは54歳であった。1377年にWilliam de Rileyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1410年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラストリックで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Toothill(이)가 1338년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Toothill(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Fixby(은)는 54세였다. 그녀는 1377년 William de Riley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 요르크실르 라스트릭에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Toothill nasceu em 1338, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Toothill, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Fixby, tinha 54 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Riley em 1377. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1410, em Rastrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Toothill родилась в 1338 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Toothill было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil Fixby, 54. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Riley в 1377 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1410 г. в местности растрикк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Toothill nació en 1338, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Toothill, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Sybil Fixby, tenía 54 años. Se casó con William de Riley en 1377. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1410, en Rastrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
